meta.title: Movyra AI | Clinical Decision Support Platform
meta.description: On-Premises & KVKK-compliant multimodal RAG/LLM platform for fast medical diagnostics and clinical workflow automation.

hero.title: AI-Powered Clinical Decision Support Platform for Healthcare & Life Sciences
hero.subtitle: On-Premises & KVKK compliant multimodal RAG/LLM platform for fast medical diagnostics and clinical workflow automation.

security.title: Zero data leakage. Full On-Premises control.
security.subtitle: Patient data never leaves your institution. Movyra AI runs with a closed-loop security architecture and strict KVKK / GDPR compliance for clinical environments.

onPrem.title: On-Premises Storage
onPrem.description: All data and models stay on institutional infrastructure — no mandatory cloud egress.

anonymized.title: Anonymized AI Pipelines
anonymized.description: Personal health information is automatically masked and filtered before reaching model layers.

audit.title: Audit Logs
audit.description: Every access and inference event is captured with timestamped, traceable audit trails.

closedLoop.title: Closed-Loop Security
closedLoop.description: Network isolation, role-based access, and zero-trust principles protect the stack end to end.

architecture.title: From clinical data to action in four steps
architecture.subtitle: An end-to-end multimodal pipeline from DICOM, EHR, and clinical notes to secure decision support.

ingestion.title: Data Ingestion
ingestion.description: DICOM imaging, EHR records, and clinical notes enter through secure institutional channels.

privacy.title: Anonymization & Privacy Filter
privacy.description: Identifiers and sensitive fields are scrubbed automatically before the KVKK privacy layer.

engine.title: Multimodal RAG & LLM Engine
engine.description: Text, tabular, and imaging signals are enriched with on-prem knowledge for grounded inference.

dashboard.title: Clinical Action & Decision Dashboard
dashboard.description: Summaries, confidence scores, and recommended actions integrate into clinician workflows.

demo.title: Try the diagnostic engine with sample cases
demo.subtitle: Switch between preset clinical scenarios to explore simulated Movyra AI outputs.

clinical.label: Clinical Report Analysis
clinical.input: 57M with exertional dyspnea and intermittent chest pain. ECG shows nonspecific ST changes. Troponin borderline.
clinical.output: High likelihood of stable angina / ACS concern. Risk stratification and cardiology consult advised. Prioritize troponin trend and stress testing.

lab.label: Laboratory Data Summarization
lab.input: WBC 12.4, CRP 48, PCT 0.8, Creatinine 1.6, eGFR 48, Na 132, K 5.1 — serial labs over 72 hours.
lab.output: Inflammatory response with mild–moderate renal impairment pattern. Early sepsis thresholds partially met; monitor fluid balance and antibiotic response.

imaging.label: Imaging & OCR
imaging.input: PA chest X-ray report (OCR): right lower zone consolidation, mild pleural effusion, borderline cardiac silhouette.
imaging.output: Radiologic findings consistent with community-acquired pneumonia. Clinical correlation and antibiotic protocol recommended; consider follow-up imaging in 48–72h.

team.title: Core competencies building clinical AI end to end
team.subtitle: Technology, finance, compliance, and operational excellence at one table.

ai.title: System & AI Architecture
ai.description: Design of multimodal RAG, LLM orchestration, and on-prem inference infrastructure.

finance.title: Financial & Banking Strategy
finance.description: Sustainable growth, investment modeling, and institutional partnership strategy.

compliance.title: Operations & Compliance
compliance.description: KVKK/GDPR processes, clinical validation, and operational governance.

industrial.title: Industrial Process & Optimization
industrial.description: Hospital workflow measurement, bottleneck analysis, and efficiency improvement.

footer.tagline: On-Premises clinical decision support for healthcare and life sciences.
footer.itu: Aligned with ITU Cekirdek Health & Life Sciences 2026.
